```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement model interpretability with SHAP/LIME"
---
# Model Interpretability
## Task
Add interpretability to ML model predictions.
## Requirements
1. Implement SHAP values for feature importance. 2. Create LIME explanations for individual predictions.
3. Generate feature importance plots. 4. Detect bias in model predictions.
5. Create human-readable explanations.
## Constraints
- Explanations must be faithful to model. SHAP for global, LIME for local. Document limitations.
## Success Criteria
- Feature importance computed. Individual predictions explainable. Bias detected.
```
